---
title: "Assignment 6 (SQL)"
author: "Clesean Glover"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Assignment 6 (SQL) Part 1

### Load the necessary packages

```{r}
install.packages("DBI")
install.packages("duckdb")


library(DBI)
library(duckdb)
library(tidyverse)

```

### a. List the first 10 rows

```{r}







```

```{r}






```

```{r}






```

```{r}







```
